events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: Flanged joints, observed incomplete bolt pattern, rough-complete. Need assess compliance per ASME PCC-1 and B16.5. Incomplete bolt pattern means not all bolts installed/tightened? Flanged joints require all bolts per pattern, proper torque sequence, full complement. At rough-complete, incomplete bolt pattern is non-compliant and likely installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk? Incomplete bolt pattern can cause gasket crush uneven, leak, potential catastrophic release in heavy industrial. Risk high maybe critical? For flanged joint incomplete bolts, high. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 70? value irrelevant 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: incomplete bolt pattern, missing fasteners, non-compliant with required bolting. actions: install all required bolts per drawing/spec, follow cross-pattern torque sequence per ASME PCC-1, inspect/verify. rationale. references ASME PCC-1, ASME B16.5. Need ensure JSON valid.

    "Flanged joint has an incomplete bolt pattern with missing or not-yet-installed fasteners.",
    "Incomplete bolting prevents proper gasket compression and joint integrity.",
    "Condition does not meet the required full-bolt complement and tightening sequence for a flanged joint."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install all required bolts, nuts, and washers per the drawing and flange rating.",
    "Follow the approved bolt-up procedure and cross-pattern torque/tension sequence per ASME PCC-1.",
    "Verify bolt count, size, grade, and condition; re-inspect before close-out.",
    "Do not proceed to pressure test or service until the bolt pattern is complete and properly tightened."
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME PCC-1 requires a complete, properly sequenced set of bolts to achieve uniform gasket load and joint tightness. ASME B16.5 flanges are designed for a specific bolt circle and full fastener complement. An incomplete bolt pattern at rough-complete is non-compliant and creates a leak/integrity hazard, so the joint fails inspection.",

    "ASME PCC-1",
    "ASME B16.5"
  ]
